sentences.target: Je vois ta silhouette près de la porte.
sentences.reading: /ʒə vwa ta silwɛt pʁɛ də la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Je vois ta silhouette près de la porte.
translations.ipa: /ʒə vwa ta silwɛt pʁɛ də la pɔʁt/
translations.en: I see your silhouette near the door.
translations.es: Veo tu silueta cerca de la puerta.
translations.de: Ich sehe deine Silhouette in der Nähe der Tür.
translations.it: Vedo la tua sagoma vicino alla porta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我看见你在门边的身影。
translations.yue: 我見到你喺門口附近嘅身影。
translations.ru: Я вижу твой силуэт у двери.
translations.pt: Vejo sua silhueta perto da porta.
translations.he: אני רואה את הצללית שלך ליד הדלת.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy bóng dáng của bạn gần cửa.
translations.nl: Ik zie je silhouet bij de deur.
translations.uk: Я бачу твій силует біля дверей.
translations.hu: Látom a sziluettedet az ajtó közelében.
translations.hi: मैं दरवाज़े के पास तुम्हारी परछाईं देख रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Βλέπω τη σιλουέτα σου κοντά στην πόρτα.
translations.nb: Jeg ser silhuetten din ved døren.
translations.id: Saya melihat siluetmu di dekat pintu.
translations.sv: Jag ser din siluett vid dörren.
translations.da: Jeg ser din silhuet ved døren.
translations.ja: ドアの近くにあなたのシルエットが見える。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun functioning as the subject of the clause.
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, selecting a direct object.
2nd-person singular possessive determiner; agrees in gender/number with the noun (feminine singular) it modifies.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of the verb 'vois'.
Preposition forming the multiword adposition 'près de'; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Preposition used within 'près de' to mark the noun phrase complement ('la porte').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'porte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'de' in the locative PP.

sentences.target: Sa silhouette apparaît derrière le rideau.

translations.fr: Sa silhouette apparaît derrière le rideau.
translations.en: Her silhouette appears behind the curtain.
translations.es: Su silueta aparece detrás de la cortina.
translations.de: Ihre Silhouette erscheint hinter dem Vorhang.
translations.it: La sua sagoma appare dietro la tenda.
translations.zh-Hans: 她的身影出现在窗帘后面。
translations.yue: 佢嘅身影喺窗簾後面出現。
translations.pt: A silhueta dela aparece atrás da cortina.
translations.vi: Bóng dáng của cô ấy xuất hiện sau tấm rèm.
translations.nl: Haar silhouet verschijnt achter het gordijn.
translations.hu: A sziluettje megjelenik a függöny mögött.
translations.hi: परदे के पीछे उसकी परछाईं उभर आती है।
translations.pl: Jej sylwetka pojawia się za zasłoną.
translations.el: Η σιλουέτα της εμφανίζεται πίσω από την κουρτίνα.
translations.nb: Silhuetten hennes dukker opp bak gardinen.
translations.ro: Silueta ei apare în spatele perdelei.
translations.cs: Její silueta se objevuje za závěsem.
translations.da: Hendes silhuet dukker op bag gardinet.
translations.ja: カーテンの後ろに彼女のシルエットが現れる。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular possessive determiner; agrees with a feminine singular noun ('silhouette').
Common noun, feminine singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Intransitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicates becoming visible.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'rideau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'derrière'.

sentences.target: On devine une silhouette dans la nuit.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ dəvin yn silwɛt dɑ̃ la nɥi/

translations.fr: On devine une silhouette dans la nuit.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ dəvin yn silwɛt dɑ̃ la nɥi/
translations.en: We can make out a silhouette in the night.
translations.es: Se distingue una silueta en la noche.
translations.de: Man erkennt eine Silhouette in der Nacht.
translations.it: Si distingue una sagoma nella notte.
translations.zh-Hans: 夜色中隐约能看见一个身影。
translations.yue: 夜晚入面隱約見到一個身影。
translations.pt: Dá para distinguir uma silhueta na noite.
translations.vi: Trong đêm có thể nhận ra một bóng dáng.
translations.nl: In de nacht is een silhouet te onderscheiden.
translations.hu: Éjjel ki lehet venni egy sziluettet.
translations.hi: रात में एक परछाईं धुंधली सी दिखती है।
translations.pl: W nocy da się dostrzec sylwetkę.
translations.nb: Om natten kan man skimte en silhuett.
translations.id: Di malam hari tampak samar-samar sebuah siluet.
translations.sv: I natten kan man ana en siluett.
translations.da: Om natten kan man ane en silhuet.
translations.ja: 夜の中にシルエットがかすかに見える。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/impersonal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular; often means 'one/people' or colloquial 'we'.
Transitive verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 'une silhouette' as direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'silhouette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'devine'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'nuit'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Je cherche ma silhouette sur la photo.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ ma silwɛt syʁ la fɔto/

translations.fr: Je cherche ma silhouette sur la photo.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ ma silwɛt syʁ la fɔto/
translations.en: I’m looking for my silhouette in the photo.
translations.es: Busco mi silueta en la foto.
translations.de: Ich suche meine Silhouette auf dem Foto.
translations.it: Cerco la mia sagoma nella foto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在照片里找我的身影。
translations.yue: 我喺張相入面搵我嘅身影。
translations.ru: Я ищу свой силуэт на фотографии.
translations.pt: Estou procurando minha silhueta na foto.
translations.he: אני מחפש את הצללית שלי בתמונה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm bóng dáng của mình trong bức ảnh.
translations.nl: Ik zoek mijn silhouet op de foto.
translations.uk: Я шукаю свій силует на фотографії.
translations.hu: A fényképen keresем a saját sziluеттемет.
translations.hi: मैं तस्वीर में अपनी परछाईं ढूंढ रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Ψάχνω τη σιλουέτα μου στη φωτογραφία.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter min silhuett på bildet.
translations.id: Saya mencari siluet saya di dalam foto.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter min siluett på fotot.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter min silhuet på billedet.
translations.ja: 写真の中から自分のシルエットを探している。
